_note: Pre-renewal skill metadata. Damage ratios are NOT here — see skill_ratio.py (sourced from Hercules skill.c). Per-level fields are list[int|str] of length max_level, index 0 = Lv1. Flat values are repeated across all levels. Boolean flag blocks stored as list[str] of true-valued keys ([] if absent). element default = 'Ele_Neutral'. number_of_hits default = 1. requirements always present (zeroed/empty defaults). unit null if not a trap/AoE skill. AmmoTypes 'All' stored as ['All']. Unit.id may be int or list[int] (hex-decoded).
